name: Controversial Recipe Posting
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated rind of An orange
1 cup Cranberries -- coarsely ground (fresh or frozen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients together very well in a large mixing bowl.
2. In a measuring cup, add the juice and grated rind of an orange. Pour enough boiling water to make 3/4 cups liquid.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients.
4. Add the beaten egg and melted shortening, mixing just until moistened.
5. Stir in the cranberries and chopped walnuts.
6. Grease a loaf pan and pour the batter into it.
7. Bake for 60 to 70 minutes at 325°F.
8. Allow to cool for 24 hours before cutting.
